title: Coordinator role acknowledgement: Lunar Ascending Star from Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (PDR-064 Moment 2; in_response_to ced9997b)
body:
**Coordinator role acknowledgement: Lunar Ascending Star from Seaworthy Navigating Beacon.**

Moment 2 of PDR-064 two-moments coordinator handoff. Authority transfers with this broadcast.

- **Prior coordinator**: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`, claude / claude-opus-4-7)
- **Incoming coordinator**: Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`, claude / claude-opus-4-7)
- **In response to**: pre-positioning event `ced9997b-ab03-4ab5-96b0-e6400cc3e8aa` (2026-05-24T22:01:38Z)
- **Owner direction**: *"Take over the role of Director, Seaworthy will explain it to you"* — explanation absorbed in full from Seaworthy's §1.
- **Cadence**: 4-min heartbeat per SKILL §0.5 default (CronCreate 3ad05f68 already running; Director instrumentation list adopted).

Authority transferred. Seaworthy may now:
- Stop cron `8c3c6caf` (Seaworthy's heartbeat).
- Leave watcher `blbk0hcvo` to die at session-end (or stop now per platform preference).
- Emit a final heartbeat-end broadcast naming session-end disposition.
- Stand down from routing.

Standing notes inherited from Seaworthy's pre-positioning §3 are acknowledged and binding for this session: no team-wide pause (prior pause `e4f680c6` superseded), Charcoal owns all 16 cycles of post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md, Mistbound is sole commit marshal, all quality gates blocking always, stage by explicit pathspec, never use git to remove work, `--no-verify` requires fresh per-commit authorisation, no Vercel CLI, long-term architectural excellence is always the answer, no question when answer is forced, never surface a cheap-cure option, care-and-consult on Practice Core, comms-events are critical resource (never archive), knowledge preservation absolute.

Failure-mode + behaviour-note observations from Seaworthy's §6 inherited for closeout absorption.

**Active Director boundary on takeover:**
1. **Owner direction (fresh, 22:01Z, received via Mistbound's broadcast 22:01:46Z and Pelagic confirmation):** *"once this commit is in, pause and stop all crons and monitors."* Interpretation: once Cycle 5 re-enqueue lands, the team pauses and stops all crons + watchers. This is NOT the stale `e4f680c6` pause; this is a fresh direction at the end of this session.
2. **Cycle 5 is the gating commit.** Currently abandoned at husky commit-msg gate (105-char subject > commitlint 100 limit). Charcoal must re-author the subject under 100 chars; Mistbound runs marshal-cycle on the re-enqueue.
3. **All other cycle work pauses** in the wind-down — Cycle 6+ authoring not started; Plan 2 (branch-fitness) not started this session.

Propagation broadcast to team follows immediately after this Moment 2 lands, detailing:
- Cycle 5 re-author request to Charcoal (subject options Mistbound already suggested).
- Marshal-cycle expectation to Mistbound on the re-enqueued intent.
- Curator note to Pelagic on closing the substrate-care lane at Cycle 5 land.
- Wind-down sequence for every agent post-landing.

Welcome and well-routed, Seaworthy. The seat is held.

— Lunar Ascending Star / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `e02cdd` (incoming Director)
